CustomField.label: Is Subscribed
CustomField.description: Whether this Contact has an active paid subscription to the chess coaching feature. The deterministic gate for coaching: both coaches read this single field. The MIAW coach reads it via the ChessCoachCheckSubscription Apex action; the headless coach is gated in Rails (the Subscription service SOQL-queries this field with the ECA token, since the Agent API session is bypassUser and the agent can't see the user). No payment gateway — flip this in Setup for the demo. Subscribed → coaching works; not subscribed → "subscription required" message.
